title: The Witness Circle
description: You watched the other players trade and mix across the table — but never saw whose ingredients were involved. Piece together what you overheard.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R+ (ing2 R?: (sign undetermined)), ing4=R+ (ing4 R?: (sign undetermined))
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing4 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing4=R+ (ing4 R?: (sign undetermined)), ing8=R- (ing8 R?: (sign undetermined))
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing4=G+ (ing4 G?: (sign undetermined)), ing8=G- (ing8 G?: (sign undetermined))
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing4=B+ (ing4 B?: (sign undetermined)), ing8=B+ (ing8 B?: (sign undetermined))
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing7 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing7=R- (ing7 R?: (sign undetermined)), ing8=R- (ing8 R?: (sign undetermined))
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.
